mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book) AS total_books, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE status IN ('BORROWED', 'OVERDUE')) AS borrowed_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 'OVERDUE') AS overdue_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'USER') AS user_count

SELECT b.id AS book_id, b.title, b.author, c.name AS category_name, COUNT(br.id) AS borrow_count FROM borrow_record br INNER JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id INNER JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id GROUP BY b.id, b.title, b.author, c.name ORDER BY borrow_count DESC, b.id LIMIT 5

SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, COUNT(br.id) AS borrow_count FROM book_category c LEFT JOIN book b ON b.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN borrow_record br ON br.book_id = b.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY borrow_count DESC, c.id

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, COUNT(br.id) AS borrow_count, SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 'OVERDUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_count FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN borrow_record br ON br.user_id = u.id WHERE u.role = 'USER' GROUP BY u.id, u.username ORDER BY borrow_count DESC, u.id LIMIT 10

SELECT DATE(br.borrow_time) AS borrow_date, COUNT(*) AS borrow_count FROM borrow_record br WHERE br.borrow_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(br.borrow_time) ORDER BY borrow_date
